articles.title: A new AI model for probing fusion plasma behavior
articles.summary: Co-designed by IBM, the UKAEA, and STFC Hartree Centre, the model could help to advance nuclear fusion as an alternative to fossil fuels.

articles.title: IBM's Hanhee Paik on the new IBM-UIUC agreement
articles.summary: We spoke with her about quantum-centric supercomputing and how her career path has mirrored quantum’s remarkable rise.

articles.title: What's new at IBM Quantum Q1 2026
articles.summary: Explore the latest updates, releases, and resources from IBM Quantum and Qiskit.

articles.title: Release News: Qiskit v2.4 is here!
articles.summary: Detailed technical release summary for Qiskit SDK v2.4

articles.title: How IBM Quantum is enabling healthcare and biology research
articles.summary: In the first ever Q4Bio Challenge, research teams sought to demonstrate scalable quantum algorithms for healthcare, with \$2 million in prize money on the line.

articles.title: Mid-training is essential for LLM reasoning, IBM study shows
articles.summary: Adding a step between pre-training and post-training matters more than people may think.

articles.title: IBM demonstrates extreme scale with a 100B vector database
articles.summary: The storage-centric vector database fits on a single server to help scale retrieval-augmented generation, unlocking new value from enterprise data.

articles.title: Ponder This Challenge - April 2026 - The Unlabeled Clock
IBM Research and ETH Zurich open a new era of innovation
articles.summary: We spoke with Alessandro Curioni, director of the IBM Research Zurich lab, about the future of computing and IBM’s long and productive collaboration with Switzerland’s top research university.

articles.title: IBM has a time-series model for every task
articles.summary: New versions of our popular time series models are best-in-class for point and probabilistic forecasting, and leaders in efficient inferencing.

articles.title: Toward a transparent supply chain for AI
articles.summary: IBM Granite 4.0 has new machine-readable disclosures that are a first step toward a broader AI “bill of materials” that documents how the models were built, trained, validated, and will be deployed.

articles.title: Quantum computers take a step into real materials science
articles.summary: An IBM quantum computer reproduced experimental signatures of real materials, according to a new preprint from IBM and researcher partners.

articles.title: Donating llm-d to the Cloud Native Computing Foundation
articles.summary: llm-d offers a replicable blueprint for developers and researchers to deploy inference stacks for any model, on any accelerator, in any cloud.

articles.title: Cleveland Clinic & IBM debut new quantum simulation workflow
articles.summary: Quantum-centric supercomputing method could enable industry-relevant simulations of very large molecules for chemical, materials science, and medical research.

articles.title: An AI solution that doesn't leave patient care up in the air
articles.summary: Put to the test with Australia's RFDS, IBM's Granite speech model passes with flying colors.

articles.title: IBM’s Charles H. Bennett earns ACM Turing award
articles.summary: IBM Fellow Charles H. Bennett and collaborator Gilles Brassard receive computing’s highest honor for foundational contributions to quantum information science.

articles.title: Doubling down on open-access quantum computing
articles.summary: New learning resources, hardware, and more for Open Plan users.

articles.title: Unveiling the first reference architecture for quantum-centric supercomputing
Realizing Feynman’s vision for the future of simulation
articles.summary: A reference architecture for quantum-centric supercomputing is extending useful quantum to HPC centers.

articles.title: IBM is working today to secure communication from tomorrow’s quantum risks
articles.summary: Cryptography researchers at IBM are working with researchers at secure messaging services Signal and Threema to help defend against future quantum computers that may be able to break much of the encryption the internet relies upon.
